house_cusps.signification: Self, personality, physical body, appearance, health, beginning of life.
Wealth, family, speech, primary education, food, assets, face.
Courage, short travels, siblings, communication, writing, efforts, hands.
Mother, home, happiness, vehicle, lands, emotions, heart, inner peace.
